name: codex-usage-monitor
description: Monitor Codex plan balance, rate-limit windows, credits, and account token activity from the menu bar or Codex.

interface.shortDescription: View Codex balance and Token activity.
interface.longDescription: Read Codex plan windows, credit balance, reset times, and account Token activity through the local Codex app-server. Includes a macOS menu-bar and floating-panel monitor.
interface.defaultPrompt: Show my current Codex plan balance and Token activity.
